task_objective: Split SDH-Ludusavi settings and runtime cache storage into Decky-provided directories and fix QAM spacing, separators, and version alignment.
design_decisions: Use Decky's SettingsManager for user settings in DECKY_PLUGIN_SETTINGS_DIR.
Store derived cache data in DECKY_PLUGIN_RUNTIME_DIR/cache.json.
Do not migrate or read the old combined state file in the split storage path.
Keep existing frontend RPC payloads unchanged.
Use a compact Dropdown row in the GAME panel to remove the blank focus area.
results: Focused backend and frontend static tests passed before full validation.
